description: This file defines a Bootstrap modal component, including its class implementation, event handling, and integration with jQuery. It manages modal display, hiding, focus trapping, backdrop handling, and related UI behaviors.

classes.name: Modal
classes.description: A class representing the Bootstrap modal component, handling show/hide logic, event management, focus trapping, backdrop control, and DOM interactions.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the modal, handling transition and focus.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the modal, handling transition and focus restoration.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up event listeners and DOM modifications related to the modal.

methods.name: handleUpdate
methods.description: Adjusts the modal layout on updates.

methods.name: _initializeBackDrop
methods.description: Creates and returns a backdrop instance for the modal.

methods.name: _initializeFocusTrap
methods.description: Creates and returns a focus trap instance for the modal.

methods.name: _showElement
methods.description: Handles the DOM manipulations and transitions to display the modal.

methods.name: _addEventListeners
methods.description: Sets up event listeners for modal interactions.

methods.name: _hideModal
methods.description: Handles the DOM manipulations and cleanup to hide the modal.

methods.name: _isAnimated
methods.description: Determines if the modal has transition animations.

methods.name: _triggerBackdropTransition
methods.description: Handles backdrop click and transition effects.

methods.name: _adjustDialog
methods.description: Adjusts dialog layout for overflowing content.

methods.name: _resetAdjustments
methods.description: Resets layout adjustments made during dialog adjustments.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery plugin interface for the modal component.
